sourceBasis: SWSE Fandom Field Kit page: Field Kit required for Survival checks to endure extreme temperatures
SWSE Fandom Survival page: Endure Extreme Temperatures is a Survival check, not Endurance
SWSE Fandom Breath Mask page: 1 hour breathable atmosphere, inhaled poison immunity, no hard vacuum/extreme temperature protection
SWSE Fandom All-Temperature Cloak page: +5 Equipment bonus to Fortitude Defense vs extreme heat/cold
SWSE Fandom Life Support page: life-support devices let creatures function in hostile environments
